name: Stinger Resources Inc.
description: Stinger Resources Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company led by an experienced management team with a strong portfolio of gold and silver properties located in British Columbia. The company owns a 100% interest in the past-producing Dunwell high-grade gold and silver mine, situated in the prolific Golden Triangle near Stewart, BC. Additionally, the company holds a 100% interest in the Gold Hill property near Fort Steele, along with interests in several other gold and silver projects across the province, aiming to deliver substantial shareholder returns through the exploration, development, and acquisition of precious metal assets.
